messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

00000006831845144000.title: Brother TN-223 Black/Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 4/Pack (TN2234PK)

paragraph: Brother TN2234PK four-pack of genuine standard-yield toner cartridges contains one cartridge each of black, cyan, magenta, and yellow toner that deliver consistent, professional laser-quality prints you can rely on for up to 1400 pages* per black cartridge and up to 1300 pages* per each color cartridge. The Brother four-pack of laser cartridges offers the convenience of having extra toner cartridges on hand. Brother toner is intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with your Brother printer to consistently deliver rich, vivid laser-quality color prints and sharp, crisp black and white laser-quality prints that withstand the test of time. Use of Brother multipack laser toner offers convenience and helps minimize the number of repeat toner orders you need to place.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L3210CW, HL-L3230CDW, HL-L3270CDW, HL-L3290CDW, MFC-L3710CW, MFC-L3750CDW and MFC-L3770CDW.
Black - Page Yield of up to 1,400 pages* per cartridge; Color - Page Yield of up to 1,300 pages* per cartridge
Multi-pack - 4 individual colors (Black, Cyan, Magenta, Yellow).
Brother Genuine TN223 4PK 4-Pack Toner Cartridges; includes 1 each of Black, Cyan, Magenta and Yellow.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

paragraph: Brother TN8502PK black toner cartridges produce crisp, sharp prints that withstand the test of time. Intelligently engineered to work in seamless unison with your Brother printer, these toner cartridges offer professional mono laser print quality you can consistently rely on for up to 8000 pages*.
bullets: Compatible with Brother DCP-L5500DN, DCP-L5600DN, DCP-L5650DN, HL-L5000D, HL-L5100DN, HL-L5200DW, HL-L5200DWT, HL-L6200DW, HL-L6200DWT, HL-L6250DW, HL-L6300DW, HL-L6400DW, HL-L6400DWT, MFC-L5700DW, MFC-L5800DW, MFC-L5850DW, MFC-L5900DW, MFC-L6700DW, MFC-L6750DW, MFC-L6800DW, MFC-L6900DW
Page Yield of up to 8,000 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine TN8502PK High-Yield 2 Pack Black Ink Cartridges.
Brother Genuine Multi-Pack Toner TN8502PK High-Yield Black Toner Cartridges.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19752 (letter/A4).
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

paragraph: Expect high-quality results for home and office documents with this printer paper. This 20 lb. weight paper is engineered to prevent jamming, making it ideal for use in all machines. With a 92 brightness rating, this paper delivers crisp text and images in black and white. Featuring 3600 sheets, this Tru Red 8.5" x 11" white printer paper provides the right amount to keep up with your daily demand.
bullets: Copy printer paper that is best for high volume, black & white printing
Paper weight: 20 lbs.
Sheet Dimension: 8.5W" x 11"L (US Letter)
Brightness rating of 92 for sharp, clear print results
White paper with a Matte finish
600 sheets per ream, 6 reams per carton, 3600 sheets total
Paper is acid-free to prevent crumbling or yellowing
Engineered to prevent jamming

headliner: Keep your copy room stocked with this 6-ream carton of Tru Red 8.5" x 11" white printer paper to handle everyday printing.

00000006831854142790.title: Brother TN-223 Black/Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 4/Pack (TN2234PK)

paragraph: Brother TN2234PK four-pack of genuine standard-yield toner cartridges contains one cartridge each of black, cyan, magenta, and yellow toner that deliver consistent, professional laser-quality prints you can rely on for up to 1400 pages* per black cartridge and up to 1300 pages* per each color cartridge. The Brother four-pack of laser cartridges offers the convenience of having extra toner cartridges on hand. Brother toner is intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with your Brother printer to consistently deliver rich, vivid laser-quality color prints and sharp, crisp black and white laser-quality prints that withstand the test of time. Use of Brother multipack laser toner offers convenience and helps minimize the number of repeat toner orders you need to place.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L3210CW, HL-L3230CDW, HL-L3270CDW, HL-L3290CDW, MFC-L3710CW, MFC-L3750CDW and MFC-L3770CDW.
Black - Page Yield of up to 1,400 pages* per cartridge; Color - Page Yield of up to 1,300 pages* per cartridge
Multi-pack - 4 individual colors (Black, Cyan, Magenta, Yellow).
Brother Genuine TN223 4PK 4-Pack Toner Cartridges; includes 1 each of Black, Cyan, Magenta and Yellow.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

00000006831854142790.title: Brother TN-223 Black/Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 4/Pack (TN2234PK)

paragraph: Brother TN2234PK four-pack of genuine standard-yield toner cartridges contains one cartridge each of black, cyan, magenta, and yellow toner that deliver consistent, professional laser-quality prints you can rely on for up to 1400 pages* per black cartridge and up to 1300 pages* per each color cartridge. The Brother four-pack of laser cartridges offers the convenience of having extra toner cartridges on hand. Brother toner is intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with your Brother printer to consistently deliver rich, vivid laser-quality color prints and sharp, crisp black and white laser-quality prints that withstand the test of time. Use of Brother multipack laser toner offers convenience and helps minimize the number of repeat toner orders you need to place.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L3210CW, HL-L3230CDW, HL-L3270CDW, HL-L3290CDW, MFC-L3710CW, MFC-L3750CDW and MFC-L3770CDW.
Black - Page Yield of up to 1,400 pages* per cartridge; Color - Page Yield of up to 1,300 pages* per cartridge
Multi-pack - 4 individual colors (Black, Cyan, Magenta, Yellow).
Brother Genuine TN223 4PK 4-Pack Toner Cartridges; includes 1 each of Black, Cyan, Magenta and Yellow.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831858177569.title: Brother TN-227 Black High Yield Toner Cartridge, Print Up to 3,000 Pages (TN227BK)

paragraph: Brother Genuine TN-227BK High Yield Black Toner Cartridges deliver consistent, crisp, professional print quality with an up to 3,000- page yield.* Brother Genuine toner is intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with your Brother printer to produce superior quality results that withstand the test of time. Use only Brother Genuine toner cartridges for reliable results. Brother offers an environmentally responsible way for customers to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges at end of life.

High Yield Black Toner Cartridge
Intelligently engineered as part of a complete printing system to work seamlessly with your Brother printer
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Brother Genuine Toner Cartridge
headliner: Brother TN227BK toner delivers superior laser print quality.
expandedDescr: Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).

Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges

00000006831861252765.title: Brother TN-221 Black Standard Yield Toner Cartridge (TN221BK)

paragraph: Print crisp, easy-to-read reports, forms and contracts with this Brother genuine black toner cartridge. A page yield of up to 2,500 pages* makes this toner ideal for use in small offices or workgroups, and the laser print quality delivers a professional look to every document you create. With its precision design, this Brother genuine black toner cartridge installs easily into select Brother printers and copiers.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-3140CW, HL-3170CDW, HL-3180CDW, MFC-9130CW, MFC-9330CDW, MFC-9340CDW
Page Yield of up to 2,500 pages*.
Intelligently engineered as part of a complete printing system to work seamlessly with your Brother printer.
Brother Genuine TN221BK Standard-Yield Black Toner Cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Get rich, deep color that stands out from the printed page from this Brother genuine black toner cartridge.
expandedDescr:
Brother TN-221BK Black Laser Toner Cartridge

Keep your printers fully stocked and performing their best with our Brother TN-221BK black laser toner cartridge. When you know that your printer is always ready when employees need it, you are free to concentrate on your workday. Reduce downtime and increase productivity by using reliable supplies that consistently get the job done right.

Enjoy Superb Image and Text Quality

This high-quality toner cartridge produces exceptional quality imaging for both text and graphic applications, and it can even be used to print stunning black-and-white photographs. Enjoy a deep and rich black hue that gives your documents that high-end look that just exudes professionalism. Text documents are crisp, clear, and easy to read without straining. The little details matter in a business setting, and this toner cartridge is just one small part of a much bigger picture. Make the best possible impression on everyone who views your documents.

Depend on Brother OEM Cartridges

Our original equipment manufacturer toner cartridges are the real deal. Brother is a highly reputable brand in the printer industry, and experts recommend using OEM toner cartridges to maximize the performance of your printers. Stay well within your company budget without compromising your commitment to quality and dependability. Our high-yield Brother TN-221BK black laser toner cartridge offers up to a 2,500-page yield at 5 percent coverage, making it the perfect solution for substantial print runs that may otherwise run dry prematurely.

Maximize Efficiency and Decrease Downtime

The equipment that you depend on should make your workday easier, not more difficult. Don't waste valuable time fussing with cartridges that are difficult to install or that run out quickly. Order the best possible supplies the first time so that you can concentrate on more important matters without interruption.

00000006831861252765.title: Brother TN-221 Black Standard Yield Toner Cartridge (TN221BK)

paragraph: Print crisp, easy-to-read reports, forms and contracts with this Brother genuine black toner cartridge. A page yield of up to 2,500 pages* makes this toner ideal for use in small offices or workgroups, and the laser print quality delivers a professional look to every document you create. With its precision design, this Brother genuine black toner cartridge installs easily into select Brother printers and copiers.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-3140CW, HL-3170CDW, HL-3180CDW, MFC-9130CW, MFC-9330CDW, MFC-9340CDW
Page Yield of up to 2,500 pages*.
Intelligently engineered as part of a complete printing system to work seamlessly with your Brother printer.
Brother Genuine TN221BK Standard-Yield Black Toner Cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Get rich, deep color that stands out from the printed page from this Brother genuine black toner cartridge.
expandedDescr:
Brother TN-221BK Black Laser Toner Cartridge

Keep your printers fully stocked and performing their best with our Brother TN-221BK black laser toner cartridge. When you know that your printer is always ready when employees need it, you are free to concentrate on your workday. Reduce downtime and increase productivity by using reliable supplies that consistently get the job done right.

Enjoy Superb Image and Text Quality

This high-quality toner cartridge produces exceptional quality imaging for both text and graphic applications, and it can even be used to print stunning black-and-white photographs. Enjoy a deep and rich black hue that gives your documents that high-end look that just exudes professionalism. Text documents are crisp, clear, and easy to read without straining. The little details matter in a business setting, and this toner cartridge is just one small part of a much bigger picture. Make the best possible impression on everyone who views your documents.

Depend on Brother OEM Cartridges

Our original equipment manufacturer toner cartridges are the real deal. Brother is a highly reputable brand in the printer industry, and experts recommend using OEM toner cartridges to maximize the performance of your printers. Stay well within your company budget without compromising your commitment to quality and dependability. Our high-yield Brother TN-221BK black laser toner cartridge offers up to a 2,500-page yield at 5 percent coverage, making it the perfect solution for substantial print runs that may otherwise run dry prematurely.

Maximize Efficiency and Decrease Downtime

The equipment that you depend on should make your workday easier, not more difficult. Don't waste valuable time fussing with cartridges that are difficult to install or that run out quickly. Order the best possible supplies the first time so that you can concentrate on more important matters without interruption.

We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831867739451.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

headliner: Big Savings for Small Business
expandedDescr: Once enrolled as a Staples Plus member, your new paid membership benefits replace any savings you may have received as an existing rewards program member (up to and including instant savings or rewards savings benefits). dummyKey.title: Duracell AA NiMH Battery, rechargeable, 4/Pack (DX1500B4N001)

paragraph: With its Ion Core technology you get amazing power in every battery. Plus, they come pre-charged and ready to use. They are guaranteed to last for 10 years* in storage and they will hold a charge for up to 1 year when not in use. These powerful NiMH batteries work in any NiMH charger and you can recharge them up to 400 times. *or up to 400 recharges, whichever comes first.
bullets: DURACELL AA RECHARGEABLE BATTERIES: The Duracell Rechargeable AA battery is designed for use in video game controllers, wireless electronics, baby monitors, and more.
RECHARGEABLE BATTERIES: These powerful NiMH batteries work in any NiMH charger and you can recharge them up to 400 times, helping save you money.
LONG LASTING CHARGE: Designed and developed with Ion Core technology. You can get hundreds of cycles out of each Duracell Rechargeable battery.
GUARANTEED FOR 10 YEARS IN STORAGE: Duracell Rechargeable batteries are guaranteed to perform for up to 10 years in storage* in storage and will hold a charge for up to 1 year when not in use.
#1 TRUSTED BATTERY BRAND: Duracell Rechargeable batteries are available in Double A (AA) and Triple A (AAA) sizes.
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Duracell Rechargeable Pre-Charged NiMH batteries let you charge hundreds of times, helping you save money.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

00000006831973877498.title: Duracell AA NiMH Battery, rechargeable, 4/Pack (DX1500B4N001)

paragraph: With its Ion Core technology you get amazing power in every battery. Plus, they come pre-charged and ready to use. They are guaranteed to last for 10 years* in storage and they will hold a charge for up to 1 year when not in use. These powerful NiMH batteries work in any NiMH charger and you can recharge them up to 400 times. *or up to 400 recharges, whichever comes first.
bullets: DURACELL AA RECHARGEABLE BATTERIES: The Duracell Rechargeable AA battery is designed for use in video game controllers, wireless electronics, baby monitors, and more.
RECHARGEABLE BATTERIES: These powerful NiMH batteries work in any NiMH charger and you can recharge them up to 400 times, helping save you money.
LONG LASTING CHARGE: Designed and developed with Ion Core technology. You can get hundreds of cycles out of each Duracell Rechargeable battery.
GUARANTEED FOR 10 YEARS IN STORAGE: Duracell Rechargeable batteries are guaranteed to perform for up to 10 years in storage* in storage and will hold a charge for up to 1 year when not in use.
#1 TRUSTED BATTERY BRAND: Duracell Rechargeable batteries are available in Double A (AA) and Triple A (AAA) sizes.
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Duracell Rechargeable Pre-Charged NiMH batteries let you charge hundreds of times, helping you save money.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message2: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.retu: Please call customer service to complete this return.
Next steps:
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: A return specialist will contact you within 3 business days to provide you with expectations for your return and refund.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cred: No action is needed from you.  You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.unde: We are unable to deliver your items and they have been returned to the warehouse. You will receive an email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.hass: We have received your return and are processing it. Once the return is complete, you will receive an email containing your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: You do not need to return the following item(s). You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
Please feel free to
Keep product and use at your discretion or
Donate the product to a worthy cause or
Discard the product, if recyclable please dispose of correctly
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

288792737397.title: Flipside Tri-Fold Project Board, 48" x 36", Corrugated Paper, White, 4/Pack (18042)

paragraph: This Flipside project display board allows for easy customization to create a lasting impression. The durable and smooth surface has a slightly glossy finish that easily accepts markers, glue, paint, and adhesives. Easily transportable, this project board is great for science fairs, presentations, picture displays, school projects, and tabletop exhibits. Made of 1-ply corrugated paper that is 100% recyclable, the board is natural brown kraft on the back.
bullets: Take your presentations to a next level with this trifold project board
Overall dimensions: 36" x 48"; side panel dimensions: 36" x 12.75"; center panel dimensions: 36" x 22.5"
Constructed from 1-ply corrugated paper
Features a durable, smooth white surface with a slightly glossy finish; the back of the board comes in natural brown kraft
Accepts paint, markers, crayons, glue, and all forms of wet or dry media
Great for job fairs, trade shows, special events, and promotions for your business
Easy to fold flat for storage
Four project boards per pack
Made in the USA

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days after your return is processed.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message1: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days once processing is complete.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message2: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.retu: Please call customer service to complete this return.
Next steps:
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: A return specialist will contact you within 3 business days to provide you with expectations for your return and refund.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cred: No action is needed from you.  You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.unde: We are unable to deliver your items and they have been returned to the warehouse. You will receive an email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.hass: We have received your return and are processing it. Once the return is complete, you will receive an email containing your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: You do not need to return the following item(s). You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
Please feel free to
Keep product and use at your discretion or
Donate the product to a worthy cause or
Discard the product, if recyclable please dispose of correctly
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location
messages.ptd.od.alert.editShipping.failure: Sorry we are not able to update your shipping address on this order.
messages.ptd.od.alert.editShipping.success: Please allow a few minutes for this update to process and reflect on your order. You will also receive an updated order confirmation email. This will reflect if this change affects the expected delivery dates, tax amount, or item availability.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831991544594.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 44/Box (006933)

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.retu: Please call customer service to complete this return.
Next steps:
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: A return specialist will contact you within 3 business days to provide you with expectations for your return and refund.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cred: No action is needed from you.  You will receive a credit email with your refund details.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: You do not need to return the following item(s). You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
Please feel free to
Keep product and use at your discretion or
Donate the product to a worthy cause or
Discard the product, if recyclable please dispose of correctly
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

00000006831996654366.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 44/Box (006933)

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

expandedDescr:
With Crayola colored pencils, any artist, young or old, can create detailed images in vivid color. The fine tips and easy-flow leads provide smooth lines and rich coloring. With a few simple techniques, such as changing the pencil angle or altering drawing pressure, it's easy to create a variety of different textures and details for artwork that is uniquely yours.

Rich, Vibrant Colors
The 12-count box of Crayola colored pencils provides all the basic colors you need to create whatever images you can imagine. You can easily blend colors to create more variety, or you can upgrade to the 24-count box to choose from even more rich colors.

Presharpened for Immediate Use
The pencils come presharpened, so they are ready to use right out of the box. When they wear down, the smooth lead tips sharpen easily.

Convenient Packaging
Each set of Crayola colored pencils comes in a sturdy box that is perfect for storing the pencils. It keeps them safe and ready for use, so you don't have to worry about lost or broken pencils.

paragraph: Scotch Magic Tape lets you magically mend the many rips and tears on school assignments - securely, permanently and invisibly. The original matte-finish invisible tape uses unique 3M adhesive technology to bond tightly with paper and disappear without a trace. It's the ideal matte tape for permanent, secure paper mending, whether you need to make a quick fix or an addition to your school projects. This clear tape is also perfect for fixing torn or ripped originals, like ripped college notebooks, essays, drawings, arts and crafts projects, library book pages and other paper projects. Easy to apply, this tape is photo-safe for worry-free mounting or mending of special photos for your dorm room or classroom. You can even write on this adhesive tape with a pen, pencil or marker, making it easy to label items. With the easy-to-use Scotch tape dispenser (included), Scotch Magic Tape rolls out smoothly and cuts easily with no time, energy or tape wasted. These dispensers are a convenient addition to teacher supplies and classroom supplies. Refill and reuse the included hand-held office tape dispenser with Scotch Brand Tape. The best projects start with the No. 1-selling home and office tape (based on 2022 NPD data).
bullets: INVISIBLE TAPE: 6 rolls of Scotch Magic Tape with dispenser mends rips and tears in college essentials, like notebooks, securely, permanently and invisibly
BONDS SECURELY: Clear tape that gives you a strong, secure and permanent seal using trusted 3M adhesive technology
BLENDS IN: Matte finish and invisible, this tape blends in with paper, making it a great addition to your back to school supplies

IDEAL FOR: Use this office tape for permanent, secure paper mending, including mounting, quick fixes, project additions and repairing items like textbooks, library pages, arts and crafts projects or study materials
REFILLABLE TAPE DISPENSERS INCLUDED: Tape glides off easy-to-use Scotch tape dispensers (included) smoothly and cuts easily
ADDITIONAL BENEFITS: This photo-safe tape is easy to apply; Plus, you can write on it with a pen, pencil or marker for easy labeling
PACKAGE CONTENTS: One package with six dispensers containing six tape rolls that are 0.75 in. x 650 in., with a 1-in. core
SCOTCH BRAND: The best projects start with the No. 1-selling home and office tape

expandedDescr:
With Crayola colored pencils, any artist, young or old, can create detailed images in vivid color. The fine tips and easy-flow leads provide smooth lines and rich coloring. With a few simple techniques, such as changing the pencil angle or altering drawing pressure, it's easy to create a variety of different textures and details for artwork that is uniquely yours.

Rich, Vibrant Colors
The 12-count box of Crayola colored pencils provides all the basic colors you need to create whatever images you can imagine. You can easily blend colors to create more variety, or you can upgrade to the 24-count box to choose from even more rich colors.

Presharpened for Immediate Use
The pencils come presharpened, so they are ready to use right out of the box. When they wear down, the smooth lead tips sharpen easily.

Convenient Packaging
Each set of Crayola colored pencils comes in a sturdy box that is perfect for storing the pencils. It keeps them safe and ready for use, so you don't have to worry about lost or broken pencils.

dummyKeySTORE.title: Scotch Magic Invisible Clear Tape With Dispenser, 0.75" x 18 yds., 1" Core, Transparent, 6 Rolls/Pack (6122)

paragraph: Scotch Magic Tape lets you magically mend the many rips and tears on school assignments - securely, permanently and invisibly. The original matte-finish invisible tape uses unique 3M adhesive technology to bond tightly with paper and disappear without a trace. It's the ideal matte tape for permanent, secure paper mending, whether you need to make a quick fix or an addition to your school projects. This clear tape is also perfect for fixing torn or ripped originals, like ripped college notebooks, essays, drawings, arts and crafts projects, library book pages and other paper projects. Easy to apply, this tape is photo-safe for worry-free mounting or mending of special photos for your dorm room or classroom. You can even write on this adhesive tape with a pen, pencil or marker, making it easy to label items. With the easy-to-use Scotch tape dispenser (included), Scotch Magic Tape rolls out smoothly and cuts easily with no time, energy or tape wasted. These dispensers are a convenient addition to teacher supplies and classroom supplies. Refill and reuse the included hand-held office tape dispenser with Scotch Brand Tape. The best projects start with the No. 1-selling home and office tape (based on 2022 NPD data).
bullets: INVISIBLE TAPE: 6 rolls of Scotch Magic Tape with dispenser mends rips and tears in college essentials, like notebooks, securely, permanently and invisibly
BONDS SECURELY: Clear tape that gives you a strong, secure and permanent seal using trusted 3M adhesive technology
BLENDS IN: Matte finish and invisible, this tape blends in with paper, making it a great addition to your back to school supplies

IDEAL FOR: Use this office tape for permanent, secure paper mending, including mounting, quick fixes, project additions and repairing items like textbooks, library pages, arts and crafts projects or study materials
REFILLABLE TAPE DISPENSERS INCLUDED: Tape glides off easy-to-use Scotch tape dispensers (included) smoothly and cuts easily
ADDITIONAL BENEFITS: This photo-safe tape is easy to apply; Plus, you can write on it with a pen, pencil or marker for easy labeling
PACKAGE CONTENTS: One package with six dispensers containing six tape rolls that are 0.75 in. x 650 in., with a 1-in. core
SCOTCH BRAND: The best projects start with the No. 1-selling home and office tape

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006832007305116.title: Sharpie Magnum Tank Permanent Marker, Chisel Tip, Black, 12/Pack (44001A)

paragraph: Create notes that last with the fade-resistant, water-resistant ink in these permanent markers. The chisel tips are extra wide, so you can easily make bold, highly-visible lines, and the aluminum barrels stand up to rough handling. These Sharpie Magnum black permanent markers come in a box of 12, making it simple to supply them to multiple workers at once.
bullets: Permanent ink formula is designed to last
Black ink markers are indispensable office supplies
Extra wide jumbo chisel tip
A dozen markers per pack
As these markers are non-toxic, they are extremely safe to use
headliner: Write notes on wood, stone, leather, and other surfaces easily with this box of 12 Sharpie Magnum black permanent markers.
expandedDescr: Safety Data Sheet

00000006832007305116.title: Sharpie Permanent Marker, Fine Tip, Black, 12/Pack (30001)

paragraph: Label files, boxes and other items around the office with these Sharpie fine-point permanent black markers. Each one features quick-drying ink to resist smudges, water and fading for long-lasting results. The black color stands out on a variety of backgrounds for visibility and fine-point tips on these permanent pens make it easy to write in small spaces. Capable of writing on plastic, cardboard and metal, these Sharpie permanent markers deliver a versatile organization-driven addition to your office supply drawer.
bullets: Permanent ink formula is designed to last
Create clear black lines with these markers, which are well-suited for a variety of office tasks
Fine-point tip creates thin, accurate lines
As these markers are non-toxic, they are extremely safe to use
Sold as 12 markers per pack
Certifications & Standards: ACMI AP Non-Toxic Certified
headliner: Make your mark with the bold color of Sharpie fine-point permanent black markers.
expandedDescr: Outfit your office or warehouse with these versatile Sharpie fine point permanent markers to create highly visible marks on a variety of surfaces. The dark black, quick-drying ink is easy to read, waterproof and fade-resistant, making it ideal for labeling boxes and files headed for long-term storage. The markers' fine-point tip creates precise, clean lines and helps you write with clarity even in the smallest spaces. An AP certification ensures these nontoxic markers are safe in a variety of settings, and this cost-efficient 12-pack provides a surplus of markers.

00000006832007305116.skuDescription: Sharpie Permanent Marker Fine Tip Black 12Pack 30001

00000006832007305116.title: Scotch Sure Start Packing Tape, 1.88" x 54.6 yds., Clear (3450)

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: The search is over with Scotch Sure Start Shipping Packing Tape. This tough, strong tape comes off the roll easily and smoothly with no slivering or splitting. This tape also delivers a smooth and quiet unwind, and when it quietly unwinds off the roll (using the uniquely designed refillable dispenser, included) and is applied to your package, it stays on—keeping your package securely sealed. Clear to the core, Scotch Sure Start Packaging Tape works beautifully for home and office. It stands up to rough handling—but so easy to handle. Scotch Sure Start Shipping Packaging Tape—always easy, always ready to help you get the job done.
bullets: Easy start every time
Clear when applied to boxes
Hot melt adhesive seals securely and ensures you don’t need layers of tape
Seals packages quietly and easily
Unwinds smoothly and quietly
Strong, durable hot melt adhesive keeps packages secure
Tough 2.6 mil thickness takes on rough handling
Resists splintering, slivering, tearing
Smooth and quiet unwind perfect for office settings
Available in multiple sizes and packouts
Clear to the core
Made locally, with globally sourced materials
headliner: When you’re in the middle of packing boxes, the last thing you want to do is search endlessly for the end of the tape.

00000006832007305116.skuDescription: Scotch Sure Start Packing Tape 188 x 546 yds Clear 3450

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

473553267845.title: Elmer's Extra Strength Washable Glue Sticks, .21 oz., Purple, 2/Pack (2027010)

paragraph: Bring bigger ideas to life with the strong bond of Elmer’s Extra Strength School Glue Sticks. Two-times stronger than Elmer’s Disappearing Purple Glue Sticks, these all-purpose glue stick to more than just paper, such as charts, pictures, buttons, fabrics, and more! Going on purple yet drying clear, you can see exactly where you’re gluing. A great school glue, Elmer’s glue sticks feature a washable, safe, nontoxic, and acid-free formula. Tackle tough arts and crafts projects that require a strong bond with Elmer’s Extra Strength School Glue Sticks.
bullets: Sticks to more surfaces- 2X stronger vs. Elmer’s Disappearing Purple Glue Sticks.
Goes on purple to help you see exactly where glue is.
Dries clear and applies smoothly for a mess-free appearance.
Works on way more than paper including wood, cardboard, buttons, cardstock, ceramic, felt/fabric, and more.
Includes 2, 6g glue sticks.
headliner: Secure documents together with a permanent bond with these Elmer's Extra Strength glue sticks.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.retu: Please call customer service to complete this return.
Next steps:

Keep product and use at your discretion or

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.

Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center

Take it to a UPS Service Center location

We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

paragraph: Keep organized and get ready for back to school with the Staples purple 2-pocket poly portfolio. Made from durable poly material, this folder helps you organize letter-sized documents and has a convenient fastener to keep everything in place. Available in a variety of colors to match your style!
bullets: Internal pockets are three-hole punched to help keep documents secure with included fastener
Poly portfolio with fastener in purple
Sold individually
Dimensions: 9.64" x 11.69"
Accommodates letter-sized documents
Capacity of portfolio: 20 paper sheets

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.

You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.

You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

Keep product and use at your discretion or

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.

You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.

You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

dummyKeyMEMBERSHIP_PROGRAM.title: Staples Plus Membership

bullets: Free delivery no minimum. Exclusions apply.
$35.99 paper – everyday.
10% back in rewards on ink & toner.
Guaranteed lowest prices on your 5 favorites.
headliner: Big Savings for Small Business
expandedDescr: Once enrolled as a Staples Plus member, your new paid membership benefits replace any savings you may have received as an existing rewards program member (up to and including instant savings or rewards savings benefits). Your business exclusive pricing and custom picks are available in store and online (subject to product availability and selection) – simply reference your Rewards member number when shopping. Members have a quantity limit of 20 units per selected item per calendar month at their special pricing rate. Members have the option to change 1 one of their 5 specially priced items every 90 days.
